summary: Carried live (CNN/WFAA) footage of a Dallas DOJ press conference where ICE's Marcos Charles commends officers who ran into gunfire to rescue detainees and condemns anti-ICE rhetoric. It is a podium press-conference recording, not a produced or music-driven spectacle.
notable_text: CNN; 'FEDERAL INVESTIGATORS GIVE UPDATE ON DEADLY ICE FACILITY SHOOTING'; 'Marcos Charles | Field Office Director of Enforcement and Removal Operations'
